author: fwyzard
body:
#### PR description:

Split the part of `HeterogeneousCore/AlpakaCore` that can be used in `DataFormats` packages and move it to`DataFormats/AlpakaCommon`.

This include `DeviceProductType` and `EDMetadata`, except for the `enqueueCallback()` function.

Instead, `enqueueCallback()` is moved from `EDMetadata` to `EDMetadataAcquireSentry`, and renamed `asyncWait()`.


#### PR validation:

Unit tests pass.


#### Backport status:

To be backported to 16.0.x for NGT online tests.
title: Split `HeterogeneousCore/AlpakaCore` into `DataFormats/AlpakaCommon`
